---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: true
toc-title: "目录"
toc-location: right
toc-depth: 2
anchor-sections: true
listing:
  contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

<script>
document.body.classList.add("sx-home-page");
</script>

<style>
/* =========================================================
   sanxi 首页：背景完全清晰版
   背景图路径：assets/img/home-bg.jpg
   核心思路：
   1. 背景图固定且清晰
   2. 页面整体不盖厚白雾
   3. 卡片自己半透明，保证文字可读
   ========================================================= */
/* =========================================================
   首页顶部导航栏：修正版，只让最外层半透明
========================================================= */

/* Quarto 顶部外壳透明 */
body.sx-home-page #quarto-header,
body.sx-home-page header#quarto-header {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 只给真正的 navbar 加半透明毛玻璃 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) !important;
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01) !important;

  backdrop-filter: blur(1px) saturate(1.18) !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(1.18) !important;

  box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24) !important;
}

/* 关键：导航栏内部所有容器必须透明，不然会叠成白块 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar-container,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .container-fluid,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-collapse,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-brand-container,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-nav,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-nav-scroll {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: none !important;
}

/* 左侧 sanxi 和菜单文字 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar .navbar-brand,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .navbar-title,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .nav-link,
body.sx-home-page .navbar a {
  color: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.94) !important;
  font-weight: 850 !important;
}

/* 鼠标悬停 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar .nav-link:hover,
body.sx-home-page .navbar a:hover {
  color: #2563eb !important;
}

/* 搜索按钮区域透明 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar .quarto-search-button,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .aa-DetachedSearchButton,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .quarto-navbar-tools,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .quarto-navbar-tools a {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  color: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.94) !important;
}

/* 右侧搜索框那个灰块去掉 */
body.sx-home-page .aa-DetachedSearchButton {
  border: none !important;
}
body.sx-home-page {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 固定背景图 */
body.sx-home-page::before {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -2;

  background-image: url("assets/img/home-bg.jpg?v=20260703");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}

/* 背景上只保留极浅遮罩，不影响清晰度 */
body.sx-home-page::after {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -1;

  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important;
  backdrop-filter: none !important;

  pointer-events: none;
}

/* 首页主体区域透明，让背景完整露出来 */
body.sx-home-page main,
body.sx-home-page .page-columns,
body.sx-home-page .content,
body.sx-home-page .quarto-container {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 顶部导航栏 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12) !important;
}

/* 首页整体容器 */
.sx-home {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3.2rem 1.2rem 5rem 1.2rem;
}

.sx-home > h1 {
  font-size: 2.65rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
  color: #ffffff;
  text-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
}

.sx-home > p {
  color: rgb(251, 235, 235);
  font-size: 1.06rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.3rem;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
}

/* 顶部左右布局 */
.sx-hero-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 2fr) minmax(330px, 0.95fr);
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: stretch;
  margin: 2rem 0 1.6rem 0;
}

/* 通用卡片 */
.sx-intro-card,
.sx-status-card,
.sx-mini-card,
.sx-widget-card,
.sx-nav-card,
.sx-tag-cloud,
.sx-note-box {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) !important;
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
}

/* 左侧简介大卡片 */
.sx-intro-card {
  padding: 2.35rem;
  min-height: 500px;
}

.sx-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
}

.sx-intro-card h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4vw, 3.05rem);
  line-height: 1.07;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: -0.065em;
  margin: 0 0 1.35rem 0;
  color: #202020;
}

.sx-intro-card p {
  color: #555555;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
}

.sx-button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.sx-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 9px 16px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-weight: 750;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.12);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.sx-btn-dark {
  background: #111111;
  color: #ffffff !important;
}

.sx-btn-dark:hover {
  background: #000000;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.sx-btn-light {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  color: #222222 !important;
}

.sx-btn-light:hover {
  background: #f7f7f7;
  color: #111111 !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

/* 当前状态卡片 */
.sx-status-card {
  padding: 2rem 1.6rem;
  height: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.sx-status-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 1.45rem;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: #222222;
}

.sx-status-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 118px minmax(0, 1fr);
  column-gap: 18px;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 1.08rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.08);
}

.sx-status-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.sx-status-label {
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sx-status-value {
  color: #202020;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  line-height: 1.75;
  word-break: keep-all;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

/* 三个主小卡片 */
.sx-three-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
}

.sx-mini-card {
  padding: 1.45rem;
  min-height: 220px;
}

.sx-card-label {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: #555555;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.sx-daily-line {
  font-size: 1.14rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: #222222;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

.sx-small-btn {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  padding: 7px 13px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.12);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  color: #222222;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
}

.sx-small-btn:hover {
  background: #111111;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.sx-mood-word {
  font-size: 2.35rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  color: #222222;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin: 0.35rem 0 0.7rem 0;
}

.sx-mood-date {
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.sx-mood-title {
  color: #333333;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.sx-mood-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.sx-text-link {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  color: #2563eb;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.sx-text-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.sx-muted {
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

/* 学习进度条 */
.sx-progress-item {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.sx-progress-item span {
  display: block;
  color: #555555;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.sx-progress-track {
  height: 7px;
  background: #eeeeee;
  border-radius: 999px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sx-progress-bar {
  height: 100%;
  background: #111111;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

/* 可调试小部件 */
.sx-widget-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
}

.sx-widget-card {
  padding: 1.5rem;
}

.sx-widget-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.sx-todo-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
}

.sx-input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 9px 12px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  min-width: 0;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94) !important;
}

.sx-todo-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding-left: 0;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.sx-todo-list li {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.9) !important;
}

.sx-todo-list button {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: #e5e7eb;
  color: #374151;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.sx-timer {
  font-size: 2.4rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  margin: 0.4rem 0 1rem 0;
}

.sx-task-text {
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #222222;
}

.sx-note-area {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 110px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  padding: 12px;
  font-family: "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", Arial, sans-serif;
  resize: vertical;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94) !important;
}

.sx-counter-number {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  margin: 0.3rem 0 0.7rem 0;
}

.sx-input-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: center;
}

.sx-input-row input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 9px 12px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  min-width: 0;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94) !important;
}

/* 内容导航 */
.sx-nav-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
}

.sx-nav-card {
  padding: 1.5rem;
}

.sx-nav-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  color: #222222;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.sx-nav-card p {
  color: #555555;
}

/* 标签云 */
.sx-tag-cloud {
  padding: 1.3rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
}

.sx-tag-cloud a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246, 246, 246, 0.92);
  color: #333333;
  font-weight: 650;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.07);
}

.sx-tag-cloud a:hover {
  background: #111111;
  color: #ffffff;
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* 说明卡片 */
.sx-note-box {
  padding: 1.4rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
  color: #555555;
  line-height: 1.9;
}

/* 文章列表卡片 */
.quarto-listing .quarto-post {
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) !important;
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  padding: 1.5rem !important;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
}

.quarto-listing .quarto-post:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2) !important;
}

/* 保留右侧目录和 Categories */
#TOC {
  display: block !important;
}

.quarto-listing-category {
  display: block !important;
}

/* 右侧目录增强 */
html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
  scroll-padding-top: 5.8rem;
}

/* 首页导航项：只保留文字“首页”，不显示下拉箭头和下拉菜单 */
.navbar-nav > li.nav-item.dropdown:first-child > a.nav-link.dropdown-toggle::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.navbar-nav > li.nav-item.dropdown:first-child > .dropdown-menu {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 右侧目录固定 */
@media (min-width: 992px) {
  #quarto-margin-sidebar,
  .quarto-margin-sidebar,
  .sidebar.margin-sidebar {
    position: fixed !important;
    top: 5.6rem !important;
    right: max(1.25rem, calc((100vw - 1320px) / 2 + 0.75rem)) !important;
    width: min(260px, 18vw) !important;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 6.4rem) !important;
    overflow-y: auto !important;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
    z-index: 50 !important;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem 1rem 0.6rem !important;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px) !important;
    border-radius: 18px !important;
    box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16) !important;
  }

  main.content,
  .page-columns main.content {
    max-width: 980px !important;
  }

  #TOC,
  nav#TOC,
  .sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] {
    position: static !important;
    top: auto !important;
    max-height: none !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    margin: 0 0 1.35rem 0 !important;
    padding: 0 0 1.15rem 0 !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eeeeee !important;
    background: transparent !important;
  }
}

#TOC #toc-title,
nav#TOC #toc-title,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] #toc-title {
  font-size: 0.95rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  color: #111111 !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem 0 !important;
}

#TOC ul,
nav#TOC ul,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] ul {
  list-style: none !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

#TOC li,
nav#TOC li,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] li {
  list-style: none !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#TOC a,
nav#TOC a,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] a {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
  padding: 0.22rem 0 0.22rem 0.7rem !important;
  border-left: 2px solid transparent !important;
  color: #374151 !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 0.94rem !important;
  line-height: 1.5 !important;
  white-space: normal !important;
}

#TOC a:hover,
nav#TOC a:hover,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] a:hover {
  color: #2563eb !important;
  border-left-color: #93c5fd !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

#TOC a.active,
#TOC .active > a,
nav#TOC a.active,
nav#TOC .active > a,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] a.active,
.sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] .active > a {
  color: #2563eb !important;
  border-left-color: #2563eb !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
}

/* Categories 保留在目录下面 */
.quarto-listing-category,
.sidebar .quarto-listing-category,
#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category {
  display: block !important;
  position: static !important;
  clear: both !important;
  float: none !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  margin: 1.15rem 0 0 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  font-size: 0.94rem !important;
  line-height: 1.6 !important;
  color: #222222 !important;
}

.quarto-listing-category-title,
.sidebar .quarto-listing-category-title,
#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category-title {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0 !important;
  font-size: 1rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  color: #222222 !important;
}

.quarto-listing-category .category,
.quarto-listing-category a,
.sidebar .quarto-listing-category .category,
.sidebar .quarto-listing-category a,
#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category .category,
#quarto-margin-sidebar .quarto-listing-category a {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0.18rem 0 !important;
  padding: 0.12rem 0 !important;
  font-size: 0.94rem !important;
  line-height: 1.6 !important;
  color: #333333 !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  white-space: normal !important;
}

.quarto-listing-category .category:hover,
.quarto-listing-category a:hover {
  color: #2563eb !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* 移动端隐藏右侧栏 */
@media (max-width: 991px) {
  #quarto-margin-sidebar,
  .quarto-margin-sidebar,
  .sidebar.margin-sidebar {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

/* 响应式 */
@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .sx-home {
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .sx-hero-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .sx-status-item {
    grid-template-columns: 130px minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .sx-three-grid,
  .sx-widget-grid,
  .sx-nav-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .sx-home {
    padding: 2.2rem 1rem 4rem 1rem;
  }

  .sx-home > h1 {
    font-size: 2rem;
  }

  .sx-intro-card {
    padding: 1.8rem;
  }

  .sx-intro-card h2 {
    font-size: 2.1rem;
  }

  .sx-todo-row,
  .sx-input-row {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .sx-status-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    row-gap: 0.25rem;
  }

  .sx-status-label {
    white-space: normal;
  }
}
/* =========================================================
   首页顶部导航栏：上下高度调整
========================================================= */

/* 控制整个导航栏上下厚度 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar {
  min-height: 58px !important;        /* 导航栏整体高度 */
  padding-top: 6px !important;        /* 上边距 */
  padding-bottom: 6px !important;     /* 下边距 */
}

/* 控制导航栏内部容器高度 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar .container-fluid,
body.sx-home-page .navbar-container {
  min-height: 46px !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}

/* 控制 首页 / 专题 / 笔记 / 日志 / 文章 / 心流 / About 这些文字的上下间距 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar .nav-link,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .navbar-brand {
  padding-top: 8px !important;
  padding-bottom: 8px !important;
  line-height: 1.2 !important;
}

/* 控制右侧搜索按钮、GitHub 图标区域的高度 */
body.sx-home-page .navbar .quarto-navbar-tools,
body.sx-home-page .navbar .aa-DetachedSearchButton {
  min-height: 42px !important;
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}
</style>

::: {.sx-home}

# sanxi 的学习与生活笔记 {#top}

把学习、代码、建模、阅读和普通日子都留下来。

:::: {.sx-hero-grid}

<div class="sx-intro-card">

<div class="sx-eyebrow">SANXI BLOG · STUDY / CODE / JOURNAL</div>

<h2>把学习、代码、建模、阅读和普通日子都留下来</h2>

<p>
这里主要记录统计学、数学建模、编程学习、Quarto 博客搭建、算法学习、数值分析、Mood Journal 和一些日常思考。文章可以慢慢写，页面先搭起来，后面再一点点填充内容。
</p>

<div class="sx-button-row">
<a class="sx-btn sx-btn-dark" href="journal.html">进入日志</a>
<a class="sx-btn sx-btn-light" href="about.html">关于我</a>
<button class="sx-btn sx-btn-light" onclick="randomJump()">🎲 随便看看</button>
</div>

</div>

<div class="sx-status-card">

<h3>当前状态</h3>

<div class="sx-status-item">
  <div class="sx-status-label">📍 身份</div>
  <div class="sx-status-value">信息与计算科学 · 大二</div>
</div>

<div class="sx-status-item">
  <div class="sx-status-label">📚 最近学习</div>
  <div class="sx-status-value">Quarto / 算法图解 / 数值分析</div>
</div>

<div class="sx-status-item">
  <div class="sx-status-label">🧭 长期方向</div>
  <div class="sx-status-value">数据分析与算法优化</div>
</div>

<div class="sx-status-item">
  <div class="sx-status-label">📅 今天</div>
  <div id="today-date" class="sx-status-value">加载中...</div>
</div>

</div>

::::

## 互动小部件 {#interactive-widgets}

:::: {.sx-three-grid}

<div class="sx-mini-card">

<div class="sx-card-label">今日一句</div>

<p id="daily-line" class="sx-daily-line">正在生成今日句子……</p>

<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="changeDailyLine()">换一句</button>

</div>

<div class="sx-mini-card sx-mood-card">

<div class="sx-card-label">MOOD JOURNAL</div>

<div id="home-mood-word" class="sx-mood-word">读取中...</div>

<div id="home-mood-date" class="sx-mood-date">正在读取 mood.csv</div>

<div id="home-mood-title" class="sx-mood-title">请稍候...</div>

<div class="sx-mood-meta">
  <span id="home-mood-average">平均心情：- / 5</span>
  <span id="home-mood-count">共 - 条记录</span>
</div>

<a href="journal.html" class="sx-text-link">进入心情日志 →</a>

</div>

<div class="sx-mini-card">

<div class="sx-card-label">学习进度条</div>

<div class="sx-progress-item">
  <span>Python</span>
  <div class="sx-progress-track">
    <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 62%;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="sx-progress-item">
  <span>Quarto Blog</span>
  <div class="sx-progress-track">
    <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 78%;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="sx-progress-item">
  <span>算法图解</span>
  <div class="sx-progress-track">
    <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 46%;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="sx-progress-item">
  <span>MATLAB</span>
  <div class="sx-progress-track">
    <div class="sx-progress-bar" style="width: 54%;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

::::

## 可调试小部件 {#debug-widgets}

<div class="sx-note-box">
这些小部件都可以直接在网页里测试。待办、快速备忘、学习计数会保存在当前浏览器的 localStorage 里，刷新页面后仍然能看到。
</div>

:::: {.sx-widget-grid}

<div class="sx-widget-card">

<h3>今日待办</h3>

<div class="sx-todo-row">
  <input id="todo-input" class="sx-input" placeholder="写下今天的一个小目标">
  <button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="addTodo()">添加</button>
</div>

<ul id="todo-list" class="sx-todo-list"></ul>

</div>

<div class="sx-widget-card">

<h3>专注计时器</h3>

<p class="sx-timer" id="focus-timer">25:00</p>

<div class="sx-button-row">
<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="startTimer()">开始</button>
<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="pauseTimer()">暂停</button>
<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="resetTimer()">重置</button>
</div>

<p class="sx-muted">适合用来做 25 分钟专注学习。</p>

</div>

<div class="sx-widget-card">

<h3>随机学习任务</h3>

<p id="study-task" class="sx-task-text">点击按钮抽一个学习任务。</p>

<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="drawTask()">抽一个</button>

</div>

<div class="sx-widget-card">

<h3>快速备忘</h3>

<textarea id="quick-note" class="sx-note-area" placeholder="这里可以临时写点想法，浏览器会自动保存。"></textarea>

<p class="sx-muted">内容会保存在当前浏览器 localStorage 中。</p>

</div>

<div class="sx-widget-card">

<h3>学习计数器</h3>

<p class="sx-counter-number" id="study-counter">0</p>

<div class="sx-button-row">
<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="increaseCounter()">+1</button>
<button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="resetCounter()">清零</button>
</div>

<p class="sx-muted">可以用来记录今天完成了几个小任务。</p>

</div>

<div class="sx-widget-card">

<h3>小计算器</h3>

<div class="sx-input-row">
  <input id="calc-input" placeholder="例如：12*3+8">
  <button class="sx-small-btn" onclick="runCalc()">计算</button>
</div>

<p id="calc-result" class="sx-task-text">结果会显示在这里。</p>

</div>

::::

## 内容导航 {#content-navigation}

:::: {.sx-nav-grid}

<div class="sx-nav-card">

<h3>📓 Mood Journal</h3>

<p>心情热力图、最近状态、每日记录和生活碎片。</p>

<a href="journal.html">进入日志</a>

</div>

<div class="sx-nav-card">

<h3>📚 学习笔记</h3>

<p>统计学、数学建模、Python、R、Quarto、算法学习等内容框架。</p>

<a href="notes.html">查看笔记</a>

</div>

<div class="sx-nav-card">

<h3>📝 博客文章</h3>

<p>后续文章都会集中出现在首页文章列表中。</p>

<a href="posts/welcome/">查看文章</a>

</div>

<div class="sx-nav-card">

<h3>👤 About</h3>

<p>关于这个博客、关于我、联系方式和博客说明。</p>

<a href="about.html">关于我</a>

</div>

::::

## 标签云 {#tag-cloud}

<div class="sx-tag-cloud">
<a href="notes.html">统计学</a>
<a href="notes.html">Python</a>
<a href="notes.html">R语言</a>
<a href="notes.html">数学建模</a>
<a href="notes.html">数值分析</a>
<a href="notes.html">算法图解</a>
<a href="journal.html">Mood Journal</a>
<a href="notes.html">Quarto</a>
<a href="posts/welcome/">博客搭建</a>
<a href="about.html">生活记录</a>
</div>

## 文章列表 {#post-list}

:::

<script>
/* =========================================================
   sanxi 首页交互脚本
   ========================================================= */

const dailyLines = [
  "学习不是突然开悟，而是每天往脑子里偷偷塞一点东西。",
  "不需要一开始就完美，先把框架搭起来。",
  "你现在写下的每一行，都是以后可以回头看的路标。",
  "真正的进步不是一天完成很多，而是很多天都没有停下。",
  "慢慢来，长期坚持比短暂热情更重要。",
  "把普通日子认真记录下来，它就不再完全普通。",
  "今天也要留下认真生活过的证据。",
  "会变好的，不是因为某一天突然轻松，而是你没有停止修正自己。",
  "努力不是为了立刻看到结果，而是为了让未来多一种可能。",
  "把一件小事做好，也是在抵抗混乱。",
  "先完成，再完美。",
  "你可以慢，但不能一直停在原地。",
  "学习的意义不是马上改变世界，而是先慢慢改变自己的眼睛。",
  "今天比昨天多懂一点，就已经很不错。",
  "长期主义不是口号，是每天愿意重复一点正确的事。"
];

function changeDailyLine() {
  const line = dailyLines[Math.floor(Math.random() * dailyLines.length)];
  const target = document.getElementById("daily-line");

  if (target) {
    target.textContent = "“" + line + "”";
  }
}

const randomPages = [
  "journal.html",
  "notes.html",
  "about.html",
  "posts/welcome/"
];

function randomJump() {
  const page = randomPages[Math.floor(Math.random() * randomPages.length)];
  window.location.href = page;
}

function updateToday() {
  const now = new Date();
  const text = `${now.getFullYear()} / ${now.getMonth() + 1} / ${now.getDate()}`;
  const target = document.getElementById("today-date");

  if (target) {
    target.textContent = text;
  }
}

function parseCSVLine(line) {
  const result = [];
  let current = "";
  let inQuotes = false;

  for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    const char = line[i];

    if (char === '"' && line[i + 1] === '"') {
      current += '"';
      i++;
    } else if (char === '"') {
      inQuotes = !inQuotes;
    } else if (char === "," && !inQuotes) {
      result.push(current.trim());
      current = "";
    } else {
      current += char;
    }
  }

  result.push(current.trim());
  return result;
}

function moodWord(score) {
  const n = Number(score);

  if (n <= 1) return "低落";
  if (n === 2) return "偏低";
  if (n === 3) return "普通";
  if (n === 4) return "不错";
  if (n >= 5) return "很好";

  return "未知";
}

function formatMoodDate(dateText) {
  const date = new Date(dateText);

  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    return dateText;
  }

  return `${date.getFullYear()} / ${date.getMonth() + 1} / ${date.getDate()}`;
}

function averageMood(records) {
  if (!records.length) {
    return "-";
  }

  const total = records.reduce((sum, item) => {
    return sum + Number(item.mood || 0);
  }, 0);

  return (total / records.length).toFixed(1);
}

async function loadMoodJournalCard() {
  const moodWordBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-word");
  const moodDateBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-date");
  const moodTitleBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-title");
  const moodAverageBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-average");
  const moodCountBox = document.getElementById("home-mood-count");

  if (!moodWordBox || !moodDateBox || !moodTitleBox || !moodAverageBox || !moodCountBox) {
    return;
  }

  try {
    const response = await fetch("assets/data/mood.csv");

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error("mood.csv 加载失败");
    }

    const text = await response.text();
    const lines = text.trim().split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean);

    if (lines.length <= 1) {
      moodWordBox.textContent = "暂无";
      moodDateBox.textContent = "mood.csv 暂无记录";
      moodTitleBox.textContent = "今天还没有写心情。";
      moodAverageBox.textContent = "平均心情：- / 5";
      moodCountBox.textContent = "共 0 条记录";
      return;
    }

    const headers = parseCSVLine(lines[0]);

    const records = lines.slice(1).map(line => {
      const values = parseCSVLine(line);
      const item = {};

      headers.forEach((header, index) => {
        item[header] = values[index] || "";
      });

      item.mood = Number(item.mood);
      item.energy = Number(item.energy);

      return item;
    }).filter(item => item.date);

    records.sort((a, b) => b.date.localeCompare(a.date));

    const latest = records[0];

    moodWordBox.textContent = moodWord(latest.mood);
    moodDateBox.textContent = `${formatMoodDate(latest.date)}｜心情 ${latest.mood}/5｜精力 ${latest.energy}/5`;
    moodTitleBox.textContent = latest.title || "今天还没有写标题。";
    moodAverageBox.textContent = `平均心情：${averageMood(records)} / 5`;
    moodCountBox.textContent = `共 ${records.length} 条记录`;

  } catch (error) {
    moodWordBox.textContent = "暂无";
    moodDateBox.textContent = "读取失败";
    moodTitleBox.textContent = "请检查 assets/data/mood.csv 是否存在。";
    moodAverageBox.textContent = "平均心情：- / 5";
    moodCountBox.textContent = "共 - 条记录";
  }
}

function loadTodos() {
  const list = document.getElementById("todo-list");

  if (!list) {
    return;
  }

  const todos = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("sanxiHomeTodos") || "[]");

  list.innerHTML = todos.map((item, index) => `
    <li>
      <span>${item}</span>
      <button onclick="removeTodo(${index})">删除</button>
    </li>
  `).join("");
}

function addTodo() {
  const input = document.getElementById("todo-input");

  if (!input) {
    return;
  }

  const value = input.value.trim();

  if (!value) {
    return;
  }

  const todos = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("sanxiHomeTodos") || "[]");
  todos.push(value);
  localStorage.setItem("sanxiHomeTodos", JSON.stringify(todos));

  input.value = "";
  loadTodos();
}

function removeTodo(index) {
  const todos = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("sanxiHomeTodos") || "[]");
  todos.splice(index, 1);
  localStorage.setItem("sanxiHomeTodos", JSON.stringify(todos));
  loadTodos();
}

let timerSeconds = 25 * 60;
let timerId = null;

function renderTimer() {
  const timer = document.getElementById("focus-timer");

  if (!timer) {
    return;
  }

  const minutes = String(Math.floor(timerSeconds / 60)).padStart(2, "0");
  const seconds = String(timerSeconds % 60).padStart(2, "0");

  timer.textContent = `${minutes}:${seconds}`;
}

function startTimer() {
  if (timerId) {
    return;
  }

  timerId = setInterval(() => {
    if (timerSeconds > 0) {
      timerSeconds--;
      renderTimer();
    } else {
      clearInterval(timerId);
      timerId = null;
      alert("专注时间结束啦！");
    }
  }, 1000);
}

function pauseTimer() {
  clearInterval(timerId);
  timerId = null;
}

function resetTimer() {
  pauseTimer();
  timerSeconds = 25 * 60;
  renderTimer();
}

const studyTasks = [
  "整理一页数值分析公式。",
  "读 20 分钟《算法图解》。",
  "写一段 Python 数据处理代码。",
  "复习一个 Quarto 配置项。",
  "把今天学到的内容写成 5 行笔记。",
  "调试一个之前没解决的代码问题。",
  "整理一篇博客文章的大纲。",
  "复习一次最短路径算法。",
  "用 R 或 Python 画一张简单图。",
  "把今天的 Mood Journal 更新一行。",
  "整理一个数学建模模板。",
  "复盘一次最近遇到的报错。"
];

function drawTask() {
  const task = studyTasks[Math.floor(Math.random() * studyTasks.length)];
  const target = document.getElementById("study-task");

  if (target) {
    target.textContent = task;
  }
}

function setupQuickNote() {
  const note = document.getElementById("quick-note");

  if (!note) {
    return;
  }

  note.value = localStorage.getItem("sanxiQuickNote") || "";

  note.addEventListener("input", () => {
    localStorage.setItem("sanxiQuickNote", note.value);
  });
}

function loadCounter() {
  const target = document.getElementById("study-counter");

  if (!target) {
    return;
  }

  target.textContent = localStorage.getItem("sanxiStudyCounter") || "0";
}

function increaseCounter() {
  const target = document.getElementById("study-counter");

  if (!target) {
    return;
  }

  let value = Number(localStorage.getItem("sanxiStudyCounter") || "0");
  value += 1;

  localStorage.setItem("sanxiStudyCounter", String(value));
  target.textContent = String(value);
}

function resetCounter() {
  const target = document.getElementById("study-counter");

  if (!target) {
    return;
  }

  localStorage.setItem("sanxiStudyCounter", "0");
  target.textContent = "0";
}

function runCalc() {
  const input = document.getElementById("calc-input");
  const result = document.getElementById("calc-result");

  if (!input || !result) {
    return;
  }

  const expression = input.value.trim();

  if (!expression) {
    result.textContent = "请输入一个表达式。";
    return;
  }

  if (!/^[0-9+\-*/().\s]+$/.test(expression)) {
    result.textContent = "只支持数字和 + - * / ( ) 小数点。";
    return;
  }

  try {
    const value = Function(`"use strict"; return (${expression})`)();
    result.textContent = `结果：${value}`;
  } catch (error) {
    result.textContent = "表达式有误，请重新输入。";
  }
}

function fixHomeNavbarDropdown() {
  const dropdownItems = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar-nav .nav-item.dropdown");

  dropdownItems.forEach(item => {
    const toggle = item.querySelector(":scope > a.nav-link.dropdown-toggle");

    if (!toggle) {
      return;
    }

    const text = toggle.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, "").trim();

    if (text === "首页") {
      toggle.classList.remove("dropdown-toggle");
      toggle.removeAttribute("data-bs-toggle");
      toggle.removeAttribute("role");
      toggle.removeAttribute("aria-expanded");
      toggle.setAttribute("href", "index.html");

      const menu = item.querySelector(":scope > .dropdown-menu");
      if (menu) {
        menu.remove();
      }

      item.classList.remove("dropdown");
    }
  });
}

function setupRightTocLinks() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#TOC a[href^="#"], .sidebar nav[role="doc-toc"] a[href^="#"]').forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener("click", event => {
      const target = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute("href"));

      if (!target) {
        return;
      }

      event.preventDefault();
      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
      history.pushState(null, "", link.getAttribute("href"));
    });
  });
}

window.changeDailyLine = changeDailyLine;
window.randomJump = randomJump;
window.addTodo = addTodo;
window.removeTodo = removeTodo;
window.startTimer = startTimer;
window.pauseTimer = pauseTimer;
window.resetTimer = resetTimer;
window.drawTask = drawTask;
window.increaseCounter = increaseCounter;
window.resetCounter = resetCounter;
window.runCalc = runCalc;

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  fixHomeNavbarDropdown();
  setupRightTocLinks();
  changeDailyLine();
  updateToday();
  loadMoodJournalCard();
  loadTodos();
  renderTimer();
  setupQuickNote();
  loadCounter();
});
</script>
